---
title: "Conlon Trail Loop (59% Gravel)"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="18.05" data-elevation="2176.84" data-time="122" data-has-gravel="true">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/wildcat-conlon-nimitz-meadow-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>18.05</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>2176.84 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:02</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.32 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#fee08b;">35%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/wildcat-conlon-nimitz-meadow-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>10.89</td>
      <td>60.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>1.90</td>
      <td>11.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>1.87</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>1.60</td>
      <td>9.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.46</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.32</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/wildcat-conlon-nimitz-meadow-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,480</td>
      <td>4.2</td>
      <td>47 ± 26</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. McBryde Avenue: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>88</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Wildcat Canyon Parkway: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>182</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>6 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Belgum Trail: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>84</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>36</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Conlon Trail: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>767</td>
      <td>1.5</td>
      <td>23 ± 15</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Conlon Trail: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>34</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Nimitz Way: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>130</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>5 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Nimitz Way: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>41</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>119</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,480</td>
      <td>17.8</td>
      <td>122 ± 48</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.8</td>
      <td>9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. McBryde Avenue: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>88</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Wildcat Canyon Parkway: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>182</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>6 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Belgum Trail: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>84</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>36</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Conlon Trail: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>767</td>
      <td>1.5</td>
      <td>23 ± 15</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Conlon Trail: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>34</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1 ± 0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Nimitz Way: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>130</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>5 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Nimitz Way: climb (hard)</td>
      <td>41</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>1 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>5.9</td>
      <td>33</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9. Wildcat Creek Trail: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>119</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>4 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.9</td>
      <td>15</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/wildcat-conlon-nimitz-meadow-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>10.6</td>
      <td>58.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>2.2</td>
      <td>12.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>1.8</td>
      <td>10.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>5.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>5.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>3.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>2.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
